Article: A Little Observation on Leliels Design
[]: A Little Observation on Leliel´s Design             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Aug 11, 2010 11:53 am Well, doesn´t that look familiar? (EvaWiki hotlink, allowed?) It´s the album cover of the Merzbow album "Pulse Demon". Merzbow is a Japanese noise-project. It was released in MAY 1996. NGE TV Episode 16 was out... 9-5-1996 (Japan-Video/LD), 3-27-2001 (US-DVD) TOO. Links on Merzbow: [url]http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pulse_Demon[/url] Audio soundbite: (I´M NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR PEOPLE THAT HAVE GONE DEAF WHILE WATCHING THIS VIDEO) [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XlGh_okr5nI[/url] This is how Shinji must´ve felt when he communicated with Leliel... I should really try watching EoE muted with this in the background. Enjoy, InstrumentalityOne[img][/img]

[]:             Quote Post by Voland » Wed Aug 11, 2010 12:00 pm you do realise that the concept of the angel was probably already finished months before that CD came out? Anno didn´t just say "oh look, I like that design, let´s scrap the original and do this...in a space of a week"

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Aug 11, 2010 12:02 pm Voland wrote: you do realise that the concept of the angel was probably already finished months before that CD came out? Anno didn´t just say "oh look, I like that design, let´s scrap the original and do this...in a space of a week"

[]:             Quote Post by Voland » Wed Aug 11, 2010 12:05 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: Yeah, you´re probably right. BUT THE COINCIDENCE! HHHHHHHHNNNNNGHHHHHHHH-

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Aug 11, 2010 12:10 pm Voland wrote: Indeed. Maybe Anno knew the artist Time to play this on my amp and wake up the neighbours
